title: Time for Mossel Bay’s Got Talent semi-final
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay's Got Talent enters its semi-final round on Saturday 6 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay's Got Talent enters its semi-final round on Saturday 6 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The show kicks off at 18:00 at the Bravo Lounge and promises an enchanting night of music, dance and poetry.","html":"The show kicks off at 18:00 at the Bravo Lounge and promises an enchanting night of music, dance and poetry."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Now in its third year, the popular competition has become a highlight of Mossel Bay Arts Month, supported by the Mossel Bay Municipality.","html":"Now in its third year, the popular competition has become a highlight of Mossel Bay Arts Month, supported by the Mossel Bay Municipality."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The initiative, first launched in 2009, was created to uplift local youth, discover hidden talent and encourage creative expression across the community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to the municipality, this year's auditions, held throughout July and August, attracted a record number of entries, with participants ranging from singers and dancers to poets and performers.","html":"According to the municipality, this year's auditions, held throughout July and August, attracted a record number of entries, with participants ranging from singers and dancers to poets and performers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Winners in the semi-final earn their place in the grand finale set to take place at the Mossel Bay Town Hall from 12:00 on Heritage Day, 24 September.","html":"Winners in the semi-final earn their place in the grand finale set to take place at the Mossel Bay Town Hall from 12:00 on Heritage Day, 24 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tickets for Saturday's event are priced at R30 for adults and R20 for children. The semi-final is scheduled to run until 22:00.","html":"Tickets for Saturday's event are priced at R30 for adults and R20 for children. The semi-final is scheduled to run until 22:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Time for Mossel Bay’s Got Talent semi-final
